name: Good Health & Well-Being
description: Nanotechnology is transforming medicine — from targeted drug delivery to nanoscale diagnostics. We explore how nanomaterials can contribute to better healthcare outcomes.

name: Quality Education
description: Quanta itself is a response to SDG 4. We are building the research culture and scientific education that universities haven't yet provided — giving students real skills, real publications, and real mentorship.

name: Affordable & Clean Energy
description: Nanomaterials are at the heart of next-generation solar cells and battery technologies. We study how nanotechnology can accelerate the transition to clean, affordable energy.

name: Industry, Innovation & Infrastructure
description: Scientific innovation starts with research. Quanta contributes to building a culture of innovation in Egypt and the region — one paper, one idea, one student at a time.

name: Climate Action
description: From nanoscale catalysts for CO₂ reduction to materials for carbon capture, nanotechnology offers powerful tools in the fight against climate change. We take that seriously.

name: Partnerships for the Goals
description: Quanta is built on collaboration — between universities, between students and professors, and eventually between Egyptian researchers and the global scientific community.
